title: Supplementary material for the Future Census consultation | Stats NZ
content:
## Supplementary material for the Future Census consultation
This page provides additional information that can be used to support submissions for the 'Modernising our approach to the 2028 Census' consultation.
Submissions for the Modernising our approach to the 2028 Census consultation closed at 5pm on 19 June 2024.
Modernising our approach to the 2028 Census has more information about the consultation and how you can make a submission for the consultation. These documents are designed to be read alongside the consultation document before making a submission.
- International examples of census models Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 598 KB

### International examples of census models
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 598 KB
- Further detail on the Census attributes graph Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 730 KB

### Further detail on the Census attributes graph
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 730 KB
- Alternate formats for the Future Census consultation 08 May 2024
- Translations for the Future Census consultation 08 May 2024
